summary: Read-only R6 final recheck of source truth / provenance / claim lineage across docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs/OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs/VERIFICATION.md, and docs/OS_V2_CONTRACT.md. P0-06 remains explicit, anchor-only records are excluded from factual support, factual/public claims require verified source chunks or durable artifacts, Context Pack labels are required, and health/graph/RAG eval failure cases remain present.

Observed that recent R3/R5 diffs strengthened native instruction coverage and RAG scaffold honesty without removing or weakening P0-06 source lineage requirements.
